name: User Registration Performance Test
description: Validate the performance of the user registration create operation under load.
preconditions: The email and username must be unique per test run (append timestamp or use random data).
Authentication is not required for this endpoint.
Application must be in a clean state (avoid email duplication).

input data.type of load: Concurrent load test with up to 100 users

notes: Ensure unique test data is generated for every request or test run to avoid duplicate registration failures affecting results.
